% check a.php
a.php:13:3: $n is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:21:3: $x is of type: int (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

/**
 * @property int $number
 */
class Foo
{
	private string $name;

	protected function process(string $another)
	{
		$n = $this->name;
		#debugType $n
	}

	public void $number;

	private function check()
	{
		$x = $this->number;
		#debugType $x
	}
}
